creator: marius@FreeBSD.org
text:
State Changed
From-To: open->suspended

Suspend; there's no point in fixing this in libscg before the fix 
for libcam/PR127605 is committed. Also I think that '-scanbus' 
not working in some configurations is a minor enough issue that 
it doesn't warrant needing to change the reply for SCG_AUTHOR. 
Instead it should be okay to wait until libscg is fixed upstream 
and to solve this for FreeBSD by updating the port to the next 
major release once available which should happen in the near 
future.
